title: pasania neurophylla
intro: Pasania neurophylla, also known as the Pasania tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pasania neurophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. Pasania neurophylla can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments in traditional medicine.
